parallel_batches.name: Foundation Kickoff
parallel_batches.entry_condition: Stage 5 audit passed and Stage 6 branch or worktree strategy selected.
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Auth/RBAC contract and workspace shell route contract are stable enough for downstream backend and frontend work.

parallel_batches.name: Persistence And Job Infrastructure
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Database, storage, queue, audit, and idempotency scaffolds have automated test coverage.

parallel_batches.name: Supplier And Import Backend
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Supplier profiles, source adapters, import batches, review diffs, commit flow, and retry behavior are validated.

parallel_batches.name: Import UI, Asset Library, And Pricing Backend
parallel_batches.entry_condition: TICKET-005 import commit contracts are merged.
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Import review wizard, asset library, pricing rules, cost breakdowns, margin calculations, and immutable snapshots are validated.

parallel_batches.name: Commercial Workspace
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Pricing workspace, bundle builder, and recipe UI preserve Stage 4 interaction and visual contracts.

parallel_batches.name: Quote Output And Operations Status
parallel_batches.parallel_note: TICKET-012 may start after quote job and async status contracts from TICKET-010 are stable; TICKET-011 waits for quote create/update/share APIs.
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Quote builder, generated quote outputs, share tokens, status center, and recovery actions are validated.

parallel_batches.name: Release Validation
parallel_batches.entry_condition: TICKET-006, TICKET-009, TICKET-011, and TICKET-012 are merged.
parallel_batches.merge_condition: Launch-critical regression, accessibility, visual QA, security evidence, and release checklist are complete.

shared_contracts: quote generation and share token contract
async job status and retry contract
Stage 4 design-system and visual acceptance contracts

workspace_plan.recommended_strategy: use one branch per batch or one worktree per implementation agent

execution_risks.risk: Parallel frontend work can drift from backend response contracts.
execution_risks.mitigation: Freeze lightweight OpenAPI or typed API client contracts at each checkpoint before parallel implementation continues.

execution_risks.risk: Visual QA evidence can be deferred until too late in the release cycle.
execution_risks.mitigation: Require screenshots and responsive checks at every frontend ticket merge, not only during TICKET-013.
